2604.05942.title: BOSCH: Black-Box Binary Optimization for Short-Context Attention-Head Selection in LLMs
2604.05942.paper_summary: Post-training hybridization of large language models (LLMs) often replaces quadratic self-attention with sliding-window attention (SWA) to reduce KV cache usage and improve latency. Existing hybridization schemes are typically defined either at the layer level (e.g., interleaving) or at the head level via static rankings from local to global. Layer-level schemes ignore that local and global dependencies are routed through heads within the same layer, while static head-level rankings suffer from entanglement: a head's local/global behavior can change after hybridization. We propose BOSCH, Black-box Binary Optimization for Short-context Head Selection, a training-free method that formulates the problem as a Large Neighborhood Search and decomposes it into three subproblems: (i) layer-importance detection via small-budget black-box probes, (ii) adaptive per-layer SWA-ratio assignment based on these sensitivities, and (iii) grouped head-level optimization within ratio buckets. Extensive experiments on 4 LLMs ranging from 1.7B to 30B parameters, across 4 SWA ratios, show that BOSCH consistently outperforms layer-level heuristics and 6 strong static head-level methods, with larger gains at higher SWA ratios. Under continual pretraining, BOSCH recover original long-context performance faster and to a higher level. Analysis of the selected heads reveals substantial turnover for BOSCH across different SWA ratios, underscoring the importance of performing head-level selection for each target ratio rather than relying on fixed locality rankings.
2604.05942.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在訓練後的混合化過程中，通常將二次自注意力替換為滑動窗口注意力（SWA），以減少 KV 快取的使用並改善延遲。現有的混合化方案通常在層級（例如，交錯）或通過靜態排名從局部到全局在頭級別上進行定義。層級方案忽略了局部和全局依賴是如何通過同一層內的頭進行路由的，而靜態頭級排名則受到纏繞的影響：頭的局部/全局行為在混合化後可能會改變。我們提出了 BOSCH，即短上下文頭選擇的黑箱二元優化，這是一種無需訓練的方法，將問題形式化為大型鄰域搜索，並將其分解為三個子問題：（i）通過小預算黑箱探針進行層重要性檢測，（ii）基於這些敏感度的自適應每層 SWA 比率分配，以及（iii）在比率桶內進行分組的頭級優化。在 4 個 LLM 上進行的廣泛實驗，參數範圍從 1.7B 到 30B，涵蓋 4 個 SWA 比率，顯示 BOSCH 一直優於層級啟發式方法和 6 種強大的靜態頭級方法，並且在較高的 SWA 比率下獲得更大的增益。在持續的預訓練下，BOSCH 更快且更高效地恢復原始的長上下文性能。對所選頭的分析顯示，BOSCH 在不同的 SWA 比率下有顯著的變化，強調了對每個目標比率進行頭級選擇的重要性，而不是依賴固定的局部排名。
2604.05942.author: Abbas Ghaddar et.al.
2604.05942.authors: Abbas Ghaddar, Ivan Kobyzev, Boxing Chen, Yufei Cui
